offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense reporting causes delays in financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem: Manual expense reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
